title: astragalus subarcuatus
intro: Astragalus subarcuatus, also known as the Lathyrus bean or subarcuate milkvetch, is a type of plant species in the legume family, native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus subarcuatus include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as potentially aiding in the treatment of conditions such as hypertension, diabetes, and respiratory diseases. Astragalus subarcuatus is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its medicinal properties.
